pr.title: refine splits and match and link itmaplib.c
pr.author: lukechampine

summary: PR #2549 split the last item translation-unit content out of src/melee/it/it_2725.c into src/melee/it/it_3F14.c, refined item splits/symbol metadata, and changed itmaplib.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The diff also adjusted ithitbox/itmaplib split boundaries and propagated the new it_3F14.h include across many item users. Bot output reported net matched/linked-code gains and 13 new matches, while also showing 2 broken matches and 1 unmatched-item regression, so validation evidence is mixed rather than clean.

key_files.role: Source TU reduced after moving large item data/table content out; diff shows 919 deletions and many removed item-specific includes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:it_2725.c removes common item GX link table and ItemLogicTable block; adds include it_3F14.h
pr_body:Got the last of the TUs split out of it_2725

key_files.role: New split-out item TU containing moved data/table and logic content formerly associated with it_2725 split region.
New header for symbols exposed by the new split TU.
Main matched code target; PR title says match and link itmaplib.c, configure marks it Matching, and bot reports several itmaplib function/data matches.
evidence_refs: bot_report:itmaplib it_802759DC, it_802765BC, it_8027737C, it_80276934, it_80277040, .sdata2, .data listed as new matches

key_files.role: Split ownership metadata updated for it_3F14, it_2725, ithitbox, and itmaplib sections.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt adds it_3F14 and adjusts it_2725/ithitbox/itmaplib text/data/sdata2 boundaries

key_files.role: Symbol metadata updated for local labels, string/float data, and sbss size around the item split.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:symbols.txt converts several address-style globals to local @ labels and changes it_804D6D1C size from 0x1 to 0x4

key_files.role: Build matching configuration updated to add it_3F14.c and mark itmaplib.c as Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:configure.py adds Object(Matching, "melee/it/it_3F14.c") and changes itmaplib to Matching

key_files.role: Adjacent TU boundary/content adjusted as part of the split refinement.
evidence_refs: splits.txt:ithitbox text end changes from 0x80275BC8 to 0x802759DC and sdata2 end changes from 0x804DC73C to 0x804DC738
bot_report:ithitbox it_802759DC listed as broken after split movement

what_changed: Moved a large item data/table block out of it_2725.c and introduced it_3F14.c plus it_3F14.h.
Refined GALE01 split boundaries so it_3F14 owns data/bss/sbss ranges previously under it_2725, and adjusted ithitbox/itmaplib text and sdata2 boundaries.
Updated symbols.txt around .data, .sdata, .sbss, and .sdata2, including conversion of multiple address-style data symbols to local @ labels and local label metadata.
Changed configure.py to include melee/it/it_3F14.c as Matching and to promote melee/it/itmaplib.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Added #include "it/it_3F14.h" to many item-related users across db, ft, gr, it core, and item files.
Deleted it_2725.h declarations and adjusted ithitbox.h/itmaplib.h surfaces according to changed-file metadata.
Bot report recorded net progress: +3072 matched-code bytes, +8512 linked-code bytes, +252 matched-data bytes, and +164 linked-data bytes.
Bot report also recorded regressions: broken matches for ithitbox it_802759DC and it_2725 .bss, plus an unmatched-item regression for it_2725 .sbss.

smart_moves.title: Split metadata, symbols, build config, and includes were changed together
smart_moves.text: The PR did not only move C source; it also updated splits.txt, symbols.txt, configure.py, and include surfaces so the new it_3F14 TU could be linked and referenced.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:many source files add it_3F14.h include

smart_moves.title: Kept scope focused on item TU split/match work
smart_moves.text: Most touched files either define the new item TU, update split/symbol/build metadata, or add the new header include to item users.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl:66 changed files, many one-line include additions
pr_body:Got the last of the TUs split out of it_2725

decomp_lessons.lesson: When carving a new TU out of an overloaded source file, update split ownership, symbol metadata, build matching status, and declarations/includes as one review unit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt adds it_3F14 and moves it_2725/ithitbox/itmaplib boundaries
raw_diff:configure.py adds it_3F14 as Matching and changes itmaplib to Matching
raw_diff:it_2725.c removes large table/data block and adds it_3F14.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bot progress reports can show net matching gains while still flagging broken adjacent matches; intake should preserve both instead of treating merge as proof of clean regression status.
evidence_refs: bot_report:2 broken matches: ithitbox it_802759DC and it_2725 .bss
bot_report:1 regression in unmatched item: it_2725 .sbss

naming_conventions.convention: New split TU/header use the address-derived name it_3F14 rather than a speculative semantic name.
Symbols metadata in the changed ranges favors local compiler-style @ labels for local literals/floats instead of global address-style names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:symbols.txt changes it_804DC708 and following sdata2 entries to @ labels with scope:local

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Refined split boundaries to reassign section ownership before marking objects as Matching.
evidence_refs: splits.txt:itmaplib text start changes from 0x80275BC8 to 0x802759DC

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted symbol scope/labels for local data and float constants to align metadata with the new split layout.
evidence_refs: symbols.txt:multiple .data/.sdata/.sdata2 entries changed from it_address names to local @ labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Propagated a new owning header include after moving declarations out of it_2725.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:dbitem.c, ftcoll.c, ground.c, it_266F.c, it_26B1.c add it_3F14.h
changed_files:many item files with one-line additions

notes: The raw diff is truncated, so detailed per-function source edits inside itmaplib.c, it_3F14.c, ithitbox.c, and it_279C.c are only partially visible.
No human review comments are present in the loaded slice; reviewer intent should not be inferred.
Bot output supports net progress and specific new/broken matches, but it also reports regressions, so the record does not claim a clean validation result.
The PR was merged according to metadata, but merge status is not treated as proof that every bot-reported regression was resolved within the loaded evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: TU split matching requires coordinated split, symbol, build, and include updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2549 shows that carving item content out of it_2725 into it_3F14 required coordinated changes to splits.txt, symbols.txt, configure.py, source includes, and headers before the new TU and itmaplib could be linked/matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt adds it_3F14 and changes it_2725/ithitbox/itmaplib boundaries
raw_diff:configure.py adds it_3F14 Matching and promotes itmaplib to Matching

accepted_candidate_records.title: Preserve regression caveats from bot reports
accepted_candidate_records.text: A PR can report net matched/linked-code gains while still listing broken matches or regressions; curator records should preserve those caveats instead of summarizing only the positive score movement.
evidence_refs: bot_report:2 broken matches and 1 unmatched-item regression

source_update_candidates.title: it_3F14.c split ownership introduced in PR #2549
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2549 added melee/it/it_3F14.c to GALE01 splits with .data 0x803F1418-0x803F1F00, .bss 0x804A0E30-0x804A0FD8, and .sbss 0x804D6D00-0x804D6D48, moving those ranges out of it_2725.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt added melee/it/it_3F14.c ranges and removed those ranges from it_2725.c
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path/split fact for curator verification; do not promote without checking current source and split history.

source_update_candidates.title: itmaplib.c marked Matching in PR #2549
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2549 changed configure.py from Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/itmaplib.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/itmaplib.c") and the bot report listed several itmaplib functions/data items as new matches.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential current path/status fact, but source-owned status should be checked against current configure and regression history.

source_update_candidates.title: Record bot regressions alongside net match gains
source_update_candidates.text: When using automated PR reports as evidence, record both net score gains and any listed broken matches/regressions; do not summarize a PR as cleanly validated if the report includes unresolved caveats in the available slice.
evidence_refs: bot_report:1 regression in an unmatched item
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with verification/regression-ledger practice, but curator should decide whether it belongs in global standards or only PR-intake guidance.

rejection_notes: Do not claim all bot-reported regressions were resolved; the loaded slice does not show that.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not generalize the local @ label symbol changes into a universal naming rule without checking current symbol conventions and adjacent PRs.
Do not treat it_3F14 as a semantic subsystem name; evidence only supports an address-style split name.
